queries.query: What are the postMessage and source-marker conventions for talking to the artifact host?
Wire up the tweaks panel so the user can change the primary color live and have it persist to the file.
Persist edit-mode changes back into the EDITMODE block in the artifact source.
Scale this 1920x1080 slide deck to fit the viewport and print cleanly to PDF.
Add speaker notes that stay in sync with the active slide in the host's side panel.
The user commented on a button — resolve which element in source they meant from the mentioned-element block.
Make these headings and labels direct-edit ready so in-place edits round-trip to source.
Bundle this prototype into a single standalone HTML file and export the deck to editable PPTX.
Make this dashboard look less like a generic AI template — tighten the hierarchy, type, and spacing.
Design a new analytics dashboard screen for our app from scratch.
Add atmospheric motion and animated depth to this landing hero.
Design the error envelope and pagination shape for our REST API before 1.0.
Run a formal WCAG 2.2 accessibility audit of our checkout — no redesign, just findings.
Refactor this service into clean architecture layers.
Polish the visual design of this prototype, then I'll deal with export.
